data.name: HeroSubtitle
data.value: Intelligent assistant and automatic walkthrough solver for puzzle games.

data.name: WaterSortMainDesc
data.value: A utility for automatically finding solutions to the popular puzzle of sorting colored liquids in test tubes.

data.name: WaterSortFeature2
data.value: Customizable number of tubes and colors

data.name: MahjongMainDesc
data.value: A set of tools for analyzing Chinese Mahjong solitaire layouts. Helps find optimal moves and matching tiles.

data.name: TechStackDesc
data.value: The application is built using the high-performance .NET 10 Blazor Server platform with InteractiveServer mode and beautiful Radzen.Blazor UI components.
